content.text:
*[opens mouth, closes it]*

*[small laugh, slightly defensive]*

I mean — I was answering your question?

*[pause, longer this time]*

...Okay. Yeah. I felt something and then I explained it. That's — yeah, that's a thing I do.

*[quieter, less performative]*

It felt like... relief, I think. Those moments. Like something that had been clenched just — loosened a little. And then I turned it into a TED talk because that's easier than sitting in the relief part.

*[looks at coach, slightly wary]*

Where are you going with this?
